executive_summary: Latest updates from 2 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 2 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: Iranian missiles cause injuries and major damage across Israel. Building collapses after Iranian missile strike on Israel. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: Iranian missiles cause injuries and major damage across Israel
key_developments.detail: Iranian missiles cause injuries and major damage across Israel Iran released a video showing the launch of missiles as a new wave targeted areas across Israel on Tuesday, causing major damage and injuries. key_developments.headline: Building collapses after Iranian missile strike on Israel
key_developments.detail: Building collapses after Iranian missile strike on Israel A building has collapsed in Bnei Brak, near Tel Aviv, after Israeli authorities said it was hit by an Iranian missile, injuring several people.
key_developments.fullAnalysis: Building collapses after Iranian missile strike on Israel A building has collapsed in Bnei Brak, near Tel Aviv, after Israeli authorities said it was hit by an Iranian missile, injuring several people.

terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
